title: I want to integrate my woocommerce website with monday.com using Zapier so that when order created order details is also store in specific group in monday.com
excerpt: I want to integrate my woocommerce website with monday.com so that when order created order details is also store in specific group according to product name in monday.com

posts.author: deepak_monday (Deepak Chatterjee)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to integrate my woocommerce website with monday.com so that when order created order details is also store in specific group according to product name in monday.com

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @deepak_monday,
That’s possible in Zapier when you Create Item in monday.com:

Monday group zap1007×825 38.5 KB

You should be able to select the specific group on the board you want to drop the order details in.
I have experience with Zapier, so let me know if you have any questions!

Greg Thomson

Monday.com Consultant
Elevate Business Operations
Email: greg@elevateops.io

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @deepak_monday

@greg_elevate is right, Zapier is probably the best way to make this happen. We’ve actually worked on similar situations in the past, so let us know if you’d like us to help you set this up

Tanner Nelson

posts.author: deepak_monday (Deepak Chatterjee)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, but i want to select group id according to product name but it cannot possible because it select random group id generated by monday.
